series_metadata.series_title: ABSTRACT OF REAL & PUBLIC UTILITY PROPERTY, dte 4259
series_metadata.series_description: Summaries of values of all real and public utility personal property taxed in Ohio''s 88 counties, filed annually with the Ohio Department of Taxation.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: This abstract be maintained with Ohio Department of Taxation. abstract is be sent Ohio Historical Society with Department of Taxation maintaining ownership permanently
